_comment_blockIdentifier1: a string embedded in the block to be mined. Used to identify the pool in Insight etc etc.
_comment_blockIdentifire2: If this value equals null string, website.stratumHost in 'config.json' is used.
_comment_BTCover17: If BTC 0.17 or higher, payment does not work please enable it

paymentProcessing._comment_paymentMode: prop, pplnt, pplns, solo, pps, dpps, fpps, ppsplus
paymentProcessing._comment_fpps: paymentMode=fpps only (Full PPS; share-based - same float/kill-switch risk as pps). Pays a per-share rate over (blockReward + smoothed average tx fee), so miners get an even slice of expected fees regardless of which block carried them. blockReward = block subsidy in coins; feePercent = pool cut; minFloat = kill-switch floor; feeWindow = blocks over which the avg tx fee is EMA-smoothed; accrualInterval = seconds (min 10). See docs/payment-schemes.md.
paymentProcessing._comment_ppsplus: paymentMode=ppsplus only (PPS+; the block SUBSIDY is paid via PPS accrual from the float, the TX-FEE portion of each block is distributed PPLNS-style to recent shares). blockReward = block subsidy in coins (kept in the wallet to back accrual); feePercent = pool cut on the subsidy; minFloat = kill-switch floor; n = fee window as a multiple of network difficulty; maxLogLength = cap on the rolling share log in entries; accrualInterval = seconds (min 10). See docs/payment-schemes.md.
paymentProcessing._comment_pplns: paymentMode=pplns only (pay-per-last-N-shares; block-based, no float/liability - see docs/payment-schemes.md). Each matured block is shared among the contributors to the last N shares before it, where the window is a multiple of the network difficulty (windowDiff = n * networkDiff) and slides across round boundaries. n = window size as a multiple of network difficulty; maxLogLength = cap on the rolling share log in entries (must comfortably exceed the shares the window covers).
paymentProcessing._comment_pps: Only used when paymentMode is 'pps' (share-based). SHARE-BASED RISK: the pool fronts block-find variance from a pre-funded float, so it owes miners coins it may not yet have — keep it behind the float monitoring at /api/metrics. blockReward = coins per block (set to your coin's CURRENT subsidy); minFloat = kill-switch, pause accrual when the spendable wallet balance drops below this; feePercent = pool cut taken off each share's pay; accrualInterval = seconds between accrual runs (min 10).
paymentProcessing._comment_dpps: Only used when paymentMode is 'dpps' (dynamic PPS). Same SHARE-BASED RISK as pps (the pool fronts variance from a float — keep it behind /api/metrics monitoring), but the per-share rate auto-throttles on the pool's realized luck instead of charging a fixed fee. blockReward = coins per block (current subsidy); targetMargin = solvency cushion taken off the rate (0.02 = 2%); rateMin = floor on the per-share rate vs full PPS (bounds pool downside); smoothingWindow = accrual cycles over which realized luck is EMA-smoothed; minFloat = kill-switch like pps; accrualInterval = seconds between accrual runs (min 10).

_comment_poolId: use it for region identification: eu, us, asia or keep default if you have one stratum instance for one coin
